instrument_rule.P1_official_icpc_package_source: official ICPC public-package source: a repository of the official ICPC organization (github.com/icpc) or official ICPC Foundation archive surface, following the ICPC/Kattis Problem Package Format — NOT a mirror, aggregator, or third-party scraper
instrument_rule.P2_dated_contest: dated contest: each problem carries an official contest date (time-anchor from the package/repo metadata)
instrument_rule.P3_post_cutoff_resistant: post-cutoff resistant: the contest date is STRICTLY AFTER the target model's KNOWN cutoff (Maverick Aug-2024 => 2024-08-31)
instrument_rule.P4_functional_compatible: functional / code-generation-compatible: a stdin->stdout programming problem the W89 mechanism can attack
instrument_rule.P5_deterministic_no_operator_curation: deterministic inclusion/exclusion (no operator curation): the selection AND ordering are fully determined by a total machine rule over the official package payload — NO hand-picking / vibes
instrument_rule.P6_machine_generated_manifest: machine-generated manifest: a reproducible fetch + a SHA-256 pin of the official package listing + a content-addressed manifest CID + a re-derivable date histogram
instrument_rule.P7_official_executable_grader_present: official executable GRADER PRESENT: the package ships a per-problem hidden-test suite (data/secret/*.in + *.ans) gradeable by a clean diff oracle (pass-fail) or a shipped output_validator. THIS IS THE ARTIFACT W118 PROVED ABSENT IN THE LCB FAMILY — present here.
instrument_rule.P8_grader_verifiably_executable: grader is verifiably EXECUTABLE: an official accepted reference solution runs in a fresh isolated subprocess against the official secret cases and PASSES (the grader self-test). Sample-only / operator-synthesised graders are refused; an interactive problem is excluded (P4).

source_family.note: Rocky Mountain Regional 2025-2026; COMPLETE packages (558 secret .in/.ans, 119 accepted reference solutions, 8 output validators). poetictournament is interactive (excluded); corporateretreat is custom-with-validator (included). Grader self-test 2/2 default-diff problems (videogames, whattimeisitmrfox) = 16/16 cases PASS.

Rocky Mountain Regional 2024-2025; ships 548 secret .in/.ans (grader present) but NO accepted reference solutions. alwaysknowwhereyourtowelis is custom WITHOUT a shipped output validator (excluded). 12 pass-fail gradeable; grader self-test transfers from the 2025-2026 harness.
Rocky Mountain Regional 2023-2024; grader present (708 secret) BUT contest date PRE Aug-2024 => EXPOSED for Maverick (not resistant).

admissibility.missing_artifact: An additional 6 post-cutoff (>2024-08-31, Maverick-resistant) pass-fail problems WITH a shipped executable grader, to reach MIN_RESISTANT_SLICE=30 from the cleanest single official surface (the icpc GitHub org currently yields 24: RMRC-2024-2025 + RMRC-2025-2026), OR one clean official second-surface aggregation (e.g. an official NWERC/regional DOMjudge package — the NWERC-2024 static zip 404s as of 2026-05-30), OR the next official ICPC regional package drop. The grader itself is PRESENT + self-test-passing (P7+P8 hold) — only the SLICE COUNT blocks.
admissibility.reason: GRADER_ADMISSIBLE_BUT_SLICE_SHORT: the official grader is PRESENT (P7) and self-test-PASSES (P8: 16/16 cases) — the W118 grader blocker is DISSOLVED — but only 24 post-cutoff resistant pass-fail problems are available from the cleanest single official surface (6 short of MIN_RESISTANT_SLICE=30). NOT pilot-admissible on the COUNT gate.

w120_fire_condition.slice_trigger: The post-cutoff (>2024-08-31) resistant pass-fail count reaches MIN_RESISTANT_SLICE=30 on a clean official surface — the next official ICPC regional package drop, OR one clean official second-surface aggregation (e.g. an official NWERC/regional DOMjudge package). The grader is ALREADY present + self-test-passing, so a slice alone unlocks the cheapest honest verdict-changing Maverick pilot.
w120_fire_condition.cutoff_trigger: A reachable stronger-than-Maverick model discloses, from a PRIMARY source, a KNOWN cutoff (widening the resistant set / strengthening the target); update MODEL_TRAINING_CUTOFFS + provenance, then re-run.
w120_fire_condition.nim_trigger: A reachable NIM endpoint (NVIDIA_API_KEY) is available in the run environment so the earned pilot can actually execute (absent here).
